overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage depicting a player walking along a dark rural path at night, approaching and entering a wooden house, then exploring the dimly lit interior. The video features atmospheric horror-game aesthetics with a fisheye lens effect, transitioning from cool blue outdoor tones to warm artificial indoor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark rural path through open fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark dirt path toward the horizon, with distant hills visible under the cloudy night sky

entered.detail: unpaved trail stretching forward into the darkness
dark silhouette of hills on the horizon
leafless trees lining the left side of the path
single-story wooden house with lit window appearing on the right

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dark dirt path through open rural terrain at night. Bare trees line the left side while distant hills silhouette against the cloudy sky. A wooden house with a lit window gradually comes into view on the right as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior of wooden house with fence and doorway

events.description: player enters the wooden house through the exterior doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the house from the path and entering through the exterior door into the interior

entered.detail: lit window with warm yellow light on the house exterior
wooden fence running alongside the house perimeter
open doorway leading into the house interior

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the open path to the immediate exterior of the wooden house, passing a fence on the left. The house window glows with warm light. The player enters through the exterior doorway, transitioning from the cold outdoor night into the sheltered interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: old house interior with office and bedroom areas

events.description: interior artificial lighting illuminates the room as the player enters from the dark outside

agents.ego_description: moving through the house interior, examining the office area with bookshelves and desk, then proceeding toward the bedroom

entered.detail: doorway with fallen door on the floor leading into the first room
tall white bookshelves filled with books and boxes
wooden desk with drawers and office chair
white filing cabinets under the desk
large bed with patterned bedding in the adjacent bedroom
ceiling fan with lights mounted on the stained ceiling
white wardrobe cabinet against the bedroom wall
striped area rug on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the house, warm artificial lighting reveals a cluttered office space with bookshelves, a desk, and filing cabinets. The player explores the interior, moving from the entry room through a doorway toward a bedroom containing a large bed, ceiling fan, and wardrobe. The space shows signs of age with stained ceilings and worn furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate rural landscape at night into the claustrophobic, dimly lit interior of a weathered home. It begins with a walk along a dark dirt path lined with bare trees, where a distant wooden house with a single lit window gradually emerges against a cloudy sky. As the camera approaches the structure, it passes a fence and moves from the cold, open night air through the exterior doorway. The scene then shifts into a warm, artificially lit office space cluttered with bookshelves and filing cabinets before gliding through a doorway into a bedroom. Finally, the movement reveals the aged details of the inner sanctum, including a large bed, a ceiling fan, and stained ceilings.
